problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Autophagy. Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
